Subject: NCM-P-2025-04-21 AZ is Home Program Update
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-04-21 08:35:13-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

The AZ is Home program has been reopened for reservations.  See below for announcement details and new Borrower Income Limits effective May 1st . 

 

We have reopened our system for new Arizona is Home reservations.  An accounting for remaining funds will be available via our HTS/Emphasys-Lender Online system, under the ŌĆ£Available FundsŌĆØ tab. As of April 21, the total remaining funds are $49.8MM .


NEW Borrower Income Limits
For all new reservations, on or after May 1st, the new borrower income limits are:
HOME Plus - $146,503
